name: run-workflow-action
description: Run a saved Workflow on a trigger's cadence — the workflow's steps become the turn's active instruction and are driven end-to-end as an unattended run (invoke, not just surface). Works on schedule, lifecycle, and event triggers.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Working Directory
x-meta.help: Optional directory to run the workflow in.

x-meta.label: Agent
x-meta.help: Agent to run the workflow as. Empty uses the default agent.

x-meta.label: Session
x-meta.help: Pin a session for continuity across fires. Empty runs a fresh ephemeral session each time.

x-meta.label: Max Turns
x-meta.help: Optional turn cap for the run.

x-meta.label: Model
x-meta.help: Optional model override for the run.

x-meta.label: Dry Run
x-meta.help: Observe-mode replay: write-capable tools return a synthetic observation instead of executing. Useful for testing a trigger safely.
